changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE question_answers_to_systems ( id serial, question_id integer NOT NULL, answer_id integer NOT NULL, system_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_question_answers_to_systems PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_question_answers_to_systems_to_question FOREIGN KEY (question_id) REFERENCES qualitative_questions (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_question_answers_to_systems_to_answer FOREIGN KEY (answer_id) REFERENCES qualitative_question_answers (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_question_answers_to_systems_to_system FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES systems (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_question_answers_to_systems_question ON question_answers_to_systems (question_id); CREATE INDEX i_question_answers_to_systems_answer ON question_answers_to_systems (answer_id); CREATE INDEX i_question_answers_to_systems_system ON question_answers_to_systems (system_id);
